core.action: Treat the highest-indexed state (index n-1) as the absorbing Default state; verify any custom absorbing state implementation preserves this index-based convention

core.action: Assign each observation to its cohort interval using the last-observation convention (observation_endpoint); do not use first-observation or average assignment methods
